notes: v0.16.19 — BASTION rechargeable barrier rework. Shield is now a damage pool (80 shield HP) that always sits in front of HP — damage hits the barrier first. Space = REFILL: presses top the bar back up to 100% and consume one of 2 refill charges. Each consumed refill takes 12s to cool down. Shield HP only refills via Space — passively the barrier just soaks until empty. HUD gauge updated with shield HP bar + numeric value + 2 refill pips + clear status states ([SPACE] REFILL · 1/2, [SPACE] FULL · 2/2, RECHARGING X.Xs). Persistent thin barrier ring around the ship while shield is up; brief cyan burst on refill press; the old 1s invuln deploy bubble is gone. Windows only.
